Linh Cherry in Japan Town

Published on 7/17/2026

Linh Cherry is the most convenient option to get FS (sex) in Ho Chi Minh City. When you enter, you choose a package and then you will get to see the lineup of girls. This can be a bit intimidating for first-timers. Just take your time.

People often ask what the best time is to go there. There is no general consensus. Some say afternoon is better, because there are fewer customers. Other people report that the lineup at night (especially around 7pm) is of better quality and there is more choice.

If you are not sure which girl to choose, you can tell mamasan your preferences and she will choose for you. Look for girls that smile, although that isn't necessarily a guarantee for good service. They can fake everything.

After you choose the girl, you will be led to the room, most likely across the street. The girl will probably give you a very simple massage (ask her to skip if you don't want to waste time on that) and then proceed to the fun part. Note: it's very unlikely that they will agree to BBFS. For that, you might want to try one of the Gaito sites or Massage Republic.

If you are not satisfied with the service, don't hesitate to complain to the mamasan. Some girls do have a bad attitude. There is a good chance that she will complain about your size. On the other hand, if everything goes well and you liked her service, you might want to ask for her Zalo. That way, you may be able to arrange further meet-ups outside of Linh Cherry.
